ict_profile: Wednesday High (bullish continuation — Tuesday formed weekly low, Wednesday expanding to new highs)
entry: TBD — NY AM Kill Zone not yet active (20:30 HKT). Pullback to 30,656 (old DR high / new support) or 30,538 (today's low) for long entries.

three_layer_analysis.l1_daily: 11th consecutive bullish D1 candle forming (May 20→Jun 3). Dealing range: 28,596.3→30,656.2 (Jun 1 high). Price broke ABOVE DR high to 30,752.3 — expansion phase. Jun 2 showed first LH (30,551.8 vs 30,656.2) but held HL (30,284.6 vs 30,256.0) — pullback absorbed. Jun 2 candle: tiny body (+3.5), massive lower wick (212.8) — strong buyer defense at discount. Price now at new highs, leaving premium zone of old range. 10 straight bullish closes, trend intact.
three_layer_analysis.l2_h4_context: H4 breakout confirmed. Jun 2 21:00 candle (NY AM) provided displacement: +162.3 body from 30,495.9→30,678.1, broke above 30,656.2 resistance. Jun 3 01:00 extended to 30,729.2. Current H4 (17:00 HKT): already at 30,752.3 high, still developing. New H4 dealing range: 30,284.6→30,752.3. Key FVG: 30,411-30,471 (60pt zone from Jun 2 consolidation) — deep support if pullback. Price above all H4 EMAs. Bullish expansion in progress.
three_layer_analysis.l3_m15_entry: London KZ (14:00-17:00 HKT) already passed. Today's low at 30,538.2 (01:30 HKT) — sweep below Asian range before rally. Price moved 30,538→30,752 (+214pts). London session consolidated 30,642-30,752, now pushing higher in post-London/early NY session. No active Kill Zone (between sessions — 18:30 HKT = 06:30 NY). NY AM KZ opens at 20:30 HKT. M15 OB candidates: 30,642-30,668 zone (London consolidation lows), 30,565-30,581 (early session sweep low). Entry: wait for NY AM pullback to 30,656 (old high retest) or 30,600 area for longs.

reasoning: NAS100 is in a powerful bullish expansion phase with 10 consecutive D1 bullish candles. The key development is the breakout above the Jun 1 high of 30,656.2 — price reached 30,752.3 on the current H4 candle. This invalidates the old dealing range and establishes a new higher range. The Jun 2 pullback (LH/HL) was absorbed and became a launchpad for the breakout. SMT check: US500 also closed bearish on Jun 2 (O=7601.7, C=7589.1, -12.6 body) but both indices have now rallied to new highs — no SMT divergence at the breakout. The Classic Tuesday Low weekly profile is playing out: Tuesday formed the weekly low (30,284.6), Wednesday is expanding higher. Risk: price is extended — 11 straight bullish candles, no meaningful pullback since May 28. A pullback to 30,656 (old resistance turned support) would be healthy. Current H4 FVG at 30,411-30,471 is too deep for an aggressive entry. Bias remains bullish but patience required — wait for NY AM Kill Zone at 20:30 HKT for entry confirmation. ORB score 62: strong HTF bias (23/25), good timing (13/15), confluence (12/15), but no VWAP/volume data available and range width is narrow (7/10).
